mapper.insert:
select board_bno_seq.nextval from dual
insert into board (bno, btitle, bcontent, bdate, bwriter, battachoname, battachsname, battachtype, battachdata) values (#{bno}, #{btitle}, #{bcontent}, sysdate, #{bwriter}, #{battachoname}, #{battachsname}, #{battachtype}, #{battachdata})
mapper.select: select bno, btitle, bcontent, bwriter, bdate, bhitcount, battachoname, battachsname, battachtype, battachdata from board where bno = #{bno}
